title: A Dangerous Taxi Ride
content: While traveling abroad, Marcus took a taxi from the airport late at night. Shortly after leaving, he noticed the driver was moving through traffic much faster than expected. Frequent lane changes and sudden braking made the ride uncomfortable. Marcus remained calm and politely asked the driver to slow down. Fortunately, the driver listened and adjusted his speed. The remainder of the trip passed without problems. Although Marcus arrived safely at his destination, the experience reminded him of the importance of staying aware and communicating clearly when traveling.
